title: test_can_see command
description: Test if any of the given entities are in the sight cone. Returns SUCCESS if at least one is seen.
markdownDescription: Test if any of the given entities are in the *sight cone*. Returns `SUCCESS` if at least one is seen.

prefixItems.title: test_can_see command
prefixItems.description: Test if any of the given entities are in the sight cone.

entities.title: Entities to Test
entities.description: List of entity IDs or aliases to test for sight.

out_bb_key.title: Output Blackboard Key
out_bb_key.description: If set, the first seen entity is written to this blackboard key.
out_bb_key.markdownDescription: If set, the first seen entity is written to this *blackboard key*.
